name: Crawfish Etouffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Season crawfish and set aside.
2. Melt oleo in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add seasoning to the oleo and stir constantly until the oil is hot.
4. Add crawfish tails to the skillet with the seasoning and stir.
5. Pour in 1 1/2 cups of cold water, then bring the mixture to a boil.
6. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. In a small bowl, dissolve cornstarch in 1/2 cup of cold water.
8. Stir this mixture into the skillet.
9. Add chopped parsley and green onion tops.
10. Cook for an additional 10 minutes until the sauce thickens.
